auth.loginInfo:
One profile. Tailored resumes for any role.
Sign in to continue your career journey.
auth.registerInfo:
One profile. Tailored resumes for any role.
Create your account and get started.

error.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
error.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
error.passwordStrength: Password must contain uppercase, lowercase, and digit
error.emailTaken: An account with this email already exists
error.accountBlocked: Your account is inactive. Contact support for assistance.
error.rateLimited: Too many failed attempts. Try again later.
error.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

incomplete.title: Complete your profile first
incomplete.text: AI needs context about you. Add at least your contact details, work experience, and education. The more useful information you provide, the better resume you will get.

generate.title: Generate your next resume
generate.hint: Start with a vacancy and get an adapted resume.
generate.tooltip: Make a new awesome resume for a specific vacancy.

update.title: Update your profile
update.hint: Use this when your experience, education, skills, or contact details change.
update.tooltip: Edit the profile data used for future resumes.

summary.readyHint: Go on with making strong resumes — sky is the limit!
summary.needsInfoHint: Add contact details, work experience, and education.
summary.incompleteResumesHint: No resumes here so far. To make them, fill your profile first and add the required information.
summary.emptyResumesHint: Make your first strong resume — it's really nice and easy!
summary.emptyStatusHint: Start making awesome resumes — it's all in your hands!
summary.readyStatusHint: Profile is ready! But you can always update it and make it even better!

table.title: Saved resumes
table.searchPlaceholder: Search by title, vacancy, or company
table.noResultsText: Try another search or change filters.

resumeDetails.title: Resume details
resumeDetails.noCoverLetter: No cover letter for this resume.

deleteResume.title: Delete resume?
deleteResume.text: This resume will no longer be available from your workspace or public link.

generate.loadingText: This may take a moment. Please keep this page open.

placeholder.title: Placeholder page
placeholder.text: This page is a placeholder for future work.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.saveError: Could not save changes. Please try again.
profile.dateRangeError: End date must be after start date.

contact.title: Contact Details
contact.purpose: Add the contact information that can be safely included in your resume. Only selected contact fields will be shown in generated resume versions.
contact.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.purpose: Add your recent and relevant work experience. Focus on responsibilities, achievements, tools, and measurable results.
experience.emptyHint: No work experience added yet. Add relevant roles to help AI generate stronger resumes.

projects.title: Projects & Volunteering
projects.purpose: Add personal, academic, professional, or volunteering projects that demonstrate your skills, initiative, and practical experience.
projects.emptyHint: No projects added yet. Add practical projects that can support your resume positioning.

education.title: Education
education.purpose: Add education records that should be considered when generating resumes.
education.emptyHint: No education added yet. Add your education information to help improve generated resumes.

courses.title: Courses & Certificates
courses.purpose: Add courses and certificates that can strengthen generated resumes and cover letters.
courses.emptyHint: No courses or certificates added yet. Add learning records that may support your future resumes.
courses.dateFilterError: End date must be after start date
courses.searchMinChars: Enter at least 3 characters to search

additional.title: Additional Info
additional.usernameHelp: This username will be used as part of your public resume link, for example: resumainer.com/yourusername/YRFJ
additional.usernameInvalid: Username must contain only English letters, digits, hyphens and underscores.
additional.skillsPlaceholder: Example: business analysis, stakeholder communication, SQL, Excel, process modeling
additional.professionalAspirationsPlaceholder: Example: I want to grow into a backend developer role and work on products that solve real business problems.
additional.achievementsPlaceholder: Example: improved reporting process, prepared requirements for 50+ business cases, automated routine analysis tasks.
additional.additionalContextForAIPlaceholder: Example: I prefer concise resumes, want to highlight analytical thinking, and want to avoid overstating my experience.
additional.additionalContextHint: Add job-related context that may help AI adapt your resume. Do not add private information that should not appear in resumes.
